overview: CMR Institute of Technology (CMRIT), Hyderabad, established in 2005 by the MGR Educational Society, is a premier autonomous engineering college. It is recognized for its commitment to technical excellence and research, serving as a key hub for engineering and management education in the Medchal-Malkajgiri region.
accreditation: UGC Autonomous status. Accredited by NAAC with an 'A+' Grade and NBA (for specific departments). Approved by AICTE and affiliated with Jawaharlal Nehru Technological University, Hyderabad (JNTUH).

coursesAndFees.course: B.Tech (CSE, AI&ML, Data Science, Cyber Security, ECE)
coursesAndFees.eligibility: 10+2 with 45% aggregate in PCM (40% for reserved) + TS EAMCET rank
Graduation with 50% aggregate + TS ICET rank

admissions.admissionProcess: 70% of seats (Category A) are filled through TGCHE web counseling based on entrance ranks. 30% are Management Quota (Category B) seats filled based on merit or JEE scores. The process includes online registration followed by certificate verification.
admissions.importantDates: TS EAMCET 2026 Engineering: May 9 - 11, 2026; Results: Mid-May 2026; Counseling: June - August 2026.

facilities: On-campus Hostels (Separate for Boys and Girls)
campus.specialNote: The institute is part of the larger CMR Group of Institutions and is situated in a pollution-free environment. It emphasizes 'outcome-based education' and provides extensive training in emerging technologies to enhance student employability.
